description: Style NoteCarry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,  these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil. Product DetailsBlack leather wallet with three-foldsHas two main compartmentsHas six card slots, four insert pockets, an id card holder and one buttoned pocket on the right to carry coinsOne insert pocket on the frontBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 12 cm x 9.5 cm
